title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow While Using App
scenario: Find My Device screen fails to show location permission dialog after granting "While Using the App" permission via "Enable Now" from App Settings
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and complete the onboarding flow.
2. When prompted for Location Sharing permission during onboarding, select "Don't Allow".
3. Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger or gear) to access App Settings.
5. Select "Find My Device" from the App Settings menu.
6. Observe the location permission dialog that appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options.
7. Tap "Enable Now" on the location permission dialog.
8. The phone's system settings for location permissions should open.
9. Grant the "While Using the App" location permission for Poly Studio Mobile.
10. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The Find My Device screen is displayed with no permission dialog, and the user can see their paired Poly Bluetooth audio devices on a map or list.
